title: Ready To Launch
description: Contains all of the mods that you need to start your adventures!
body:
# Ready to Launch (RtL)

Your **go-to starter modpack** for a fresh, upgraded Minecraft experience!

---

## 🚀 Why Choose RtL?

- **Effortless Vanilla+**: Get a carefully curated selection of Vanilla+ mods, boosting your gameplay without overwhelming changes.  
- **Voltun Lite vibes**: All the fun of [Voltun](https://modrinth.com/modpack/voltun), but lighter on performance and easier to customize.  
- **Never miss the essentials**: RtL covers your bases, so you don’t have to worry about forgetting must-have mods for any new pack.

---

## 💡 What is RtL?

Ready to Launch (RtL) is designed for players and creators who want to jump into new worlds or modpacks **no endless hunting for "core" mods required**. We save you hours of setup for (almost) every Minecraft version* and major mod loader.

---

## 📦 What’s Included?

RtL comes packed with foundational mods like:
- **Essential Mod**
- **e4mc**
- **Iris & Shaders**
- **3D Skin Layers**
- ...and loads more! (Seriously, everything you need for a modern Minecraft playthrough.)

Most releases include **80-110 projects** (mods, shaders, resource packs), with customization just a click away on Modrinth. And we’re making that process even easier soon!

---

<details>
<summary>🔮 Future Plans (Click to expand)</summary>

- We're aiming to support nearly *every* version of Minecraft with Ready to Launch!
- (*Some versions may not be available due to missing mod support.)

</details>

---

*Ready to Launch, skip the setup, jump into fun!*
